text: Entering this space, an R+D showcase for responsive and rapidly evolving development, I sense both anticipation and introspection. The glass doors separate me from the world behind me, making this room feel like a threshold between ideas and realities. It’s quiet, almost sacred, yet vibrant in its colors and lights. I feel a gentle awe mixed with curiosity—invited to reflect on how humanity interacts with technology and knowledge, and what it means to search for meaning in an ever-evolving world.
